sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_hash (id UInt32, data String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, murmurHash2_32(data) AS hash_value FROM test_hash WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_hash SET data = 'updated_example' WHERE id = 2;
SELECT id, murmurHash2_64(array(data, 'extra_data'), 123) AS complex_hash FROM test_hash;
